name: Retrowave Rider
short_description: Retrowave Rider is a precision-platformer where you control the character and the level. Explore synthwave worlds with retro visuals and smooth synth sounds. This journey is filled with trials and triumphs.
detailed_description: Embark on a neon-lit adventure with Drive forward. Conquer the road ahead as you use your color-switching powers to reshape levels to your advantage. With hand-crafted level design and a unique blend of runner and puzzle gameplay, Drive forward will keep you on your toes. Collect extra items to unlock customization options for your rider, and enjoy accessibility support for those with colorblindness or slower reaction times. Don't miss out on this one-of-a-kind driving experience.
